title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・これが“怪物”よ

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (I'm gonna win! This is my chance to—)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And it's Oguri Cap! Oguri Cap has taken the lead!
She takes first place!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Dammit, Oguri! And she even trounced Tama too!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(I hate to admit defeat, but Oguri's way ahead of
me! I can't leave things like this!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I've got to train up even more! MUCH more!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Just you wait. I'm gonna beat you someday!
